TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1946 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 14 a romi'ad masofoc ci Donald John Trump , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Puerto rico , United states anini i ci Donald John Trump, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pimmanaw ni Obama iti opisinana idi Enero 20, 2021.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …¨~…ģo~una…ĺ…¨~…ģ *o~uńßn tro~u~ump , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u po~u~u…ôrto~u ri ¶o~u , o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ stat…ôs anini i ¶i …¨~…ģo~una…ĺ…¨~…ģ *o~uńßn tro~u~ump, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pimmanaw ni o~ub~b~vama iti o~upisinana i…¨~…ģi …ôn…ôro~u **, ****.
S.FORM: I 1946 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 14 a romi'ad masofoc ci Donald John Trump , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Puerto rico , United states anini i ci Donald John Trump, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pimmanaw ni Obama iti opisinana idi Enero 20, 2021.
